intentSynonyms: get a list feed in bsky
look up a list feed in bsky
fetch a single list feed in bsky
view one specific list feed in bsky
get posts from a user list in bsky
description: Get posts from a user list. Requires the list AT URI.

list.description: AT URI of the list (e.g., at://did/app.bsky.graph.list/rkey)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default 50, max 100)
